playerOwnedOnly.name: Player Owned Only
playerOwnedOnly.hint: Show Skill Tree header button only on player owned actors

playersCantEditPoints.name: Players Can't Edit Points
playersCantEditPoints.hint: Only the GM will be able to edit the total points of an actor

playersCantRemovePoints.name: Players Can't Remove Points
playersCantRemovePoints.hint: Players won't be able to remove points from skills they already unlocked

playersRequestSkillRemoval.name: Players Request Skill Removal
playersRequestSkillRemoval.hint: When Players Can't Remove Points is enabled, right-clicking an unlocked skill submits a GM approval request instead of removing it.

autoSkillPointsByLevel.name: Auto Skill Points from Level
autoSkillPointsByLevel.hint: Automatically sets actor skill points from their level using the settings below.

skillPointsLevelTable.name: Skill Points Level Table
skillPointsLevelTable.hint: Optional override table. Format one entry per level, separated by commas: 2=2,3=+4,4=+1. Use N=V for absolute total at level N, or N=+V/N=-V for relative change at that level. If empty, the formula settings below are used.

skillPointsPerLevel.name: Skill Points Per Level
skillPointsPerLevel.hint: How many total skill points each level grants when auto-scaling is enabled.

skillPointsFlatBonus.name: Skill Point Flat Bonus
skillPointsFlatBonus.hint: A flat number of total skill points added on top of level-based points when auto-scaling is enabled.

point-build-config.name: Point Builds
point-build-config.label: Configure Point Builds
point-build-config.hint: Configure build names and max points for automatic point calculation

skill-points-level-table.name: Skill Points by Level Table
skill-points-level-table.label: Configure Level Table
skill-points-level-table.hint: Configure skill points per level using a row-based table.

skill-removal-request-manager.name: Skill Removal Requests
skill-removal-request-manager.label: Review Removal Requests
skill-removal-request-manager.hint: Review and approve or reject player requests to remove unlocked skills.

skill-tree-actor.title: Skill Tree:
skill-tree-actor.mutual-exclusion-info: Only %n skills with the same requirement as this skill can be unlocked at the same time.
skill-tree-actor.no-skill-trees: There are no Skill Trees available for this actor. Make sure the GM has created a Skill Tree and granted the proper permissions.
skill-tree-actor.removal-request-created: Skill removal request sent to the GM.
skill-tree-actor.removal-request-duplicate: A pending removal request already exists for this skill.

skill-tree-build-config.title: Point Build Configuration
skill-tree-build-config.name: Build Name
skill-tree-build-config.edit-skills-hint: Select skills for this build from any skill tree.
skill-tree-build-config.edit-skills-costs-hint: Optional: set manual max costs per skill. Set to 0 to keep automatic distribution.
skill-tree-build-config.edit-skills-costs-field-hint: Manual max cost override. 0 means automatic.
skill-tree-build-config.no-skills: Add skills to the build before editing costs.
skill-tree-build-config.mismatch-warning: Skill totals do not match Max Points

skill-points-level-table-config.title: Skill Points by Level Table
skill-points-level-table-config.hint: Set an absolute total or relative change for each level.
skill-points-level-table-config.empty: No rules yet. Add a row to start.

point-build-skill-picker.title: Select Build Skills: %s
point-build-skill-picker.hint: Click skills to add or remove them from this build. Switch skill trees using the menu above.

skill-tree-manager.title: Skill Tree Manager
skill-tree-manager.new-skill-tree-name-hint: The name of the skill tree
skill-tree-manager.name: Name
skill-tree-manager.resync-failed: Failed to resync actors. See console for details.
skill-tree-manager.resync-unavailable: Resync API is unavailable. Reload the world and try again.

skill-tree-application.title: Skill Tree Editor:
skill-tree-application.configure-skill-tree-image-hint: The image to use as the points image
skill-tree-application.configure-skill-tree-required-classes-hi: Comma-separated class names or identifiers. If set, this tree is only shown to actors with at least one matching class.
skill-tree-application.edit-group-image-hint: The image to use as the background for the group
skill-tree-application.edit-group-blur-background-hint: Whether to blur the background image
skill-tree-application.edit-group-sound-hint: The sound effect to play when a skill is unlocked
skill-tree-application.edit-group-min-rows-hint: The minimum number of rows in the grid
skill-tree-application.edit-group-min-cols-hint: The minimum number of columns in the grid
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-color-hint: If set will override the group color
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-style-hint: If set will override the skill tree style
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-points-hint: The number of points required to unlock this skill.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-points-derived-hint: This value is derived from Point Build Configuration across all builds that include this skill.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-build-costs-hint: These are the current costs derived from Point Build Configuration for this skill.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-item-hint: When a skill is unlocked, its linked items are added to the actor; when removed, the items are also removed. For skills requiring multiple points, items are granted based on points spent. For example, with a 3-point skill and 3 items, one item is granted per point. If 5 points are required for 3 items, one item is granted for every 2 points, with the last item given on the fifth point.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-connected-skills-hint: Skills required to unlock this skill. Follows the required skill rule.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-linked-skill-rule-hint: If set to a number larger than 0, this will override the required skill rule and require the specified number of required skills (or more) to be unlocked in order for this skill to be unlocked
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-mutual-exclusion-hint: If set to a number larger than 1, only the specified number of skills required by the same skill as this one can be unlocked at the same time
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-condition-script-hint: A script that will be checked to determine if this skill can be unlocked. The script must return a boolean value. You can reference actor, skill, group and skillTree in the macro.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-on-unlock-hint: A script that will be run when this skill is unlocked or when a point is spent. You can reference actor, skill, group and skillTree in the macro.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-lockout-skills-hint: If any skill in this list is unlocked, this skill will not be able to be unlocked
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-minimum-points-in-group-hint: The minimum number of points spent in the group required to unlock this skill.
skill-tree-application.edit-skill-maximum-points-in-group-hint: The maximum number of points that can be spent in the group to unlock this skill. Set to 0 to disable.
skill-tree-application.linked-skill-rule-hint:
How required skills should behave:

 - Some: Only one required skill is required to unlock a skill

 - All: All required skills must be unlocked in order for a skill to be unlocked
skill-tree-application.multiple-items-rule-hint:
How multiple items should behave in tiered skills:

 - All: All items are granted

 - One: Only the item corresponding to the current tier is granted
skill-tree-application.skill-style-hint:
How skills should be displayed:

 - Circle: Skills are displayed as circles

 - Square: Skills are displayed as squares
skill-tree-application.independent-skill-points-hint: If set, skill points in this tree will be local to the skill tree and not shared with other trees on the same actor.
skill-tree-application.show-skill-points-in-group-hint: If set, skill points spent in a group will be shown in the group header.
skill-tree-application.drop-error: You can only drop items or other skills onto the grid
skill-tree-application.delete-group-content: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This will also delete all skills in the group.
skill-tree-application.allow-incomplete-progression-hint: Number of points which will make this skill count as unlocked, allowing progression in the skill tree. Set to 0 to disable.
